description_long: This is a metallic kettle with a rounded, dome-shaped body and a slightly weathered, matte finish. The kettle features a prominent, arched black handle attached at the top, allowing for easy lifting and pouring. A short, cylindrical spout extends from the side, designed for controlled pouring of hot liquids. The lid is domed and removable, topped with a small, spherical knob for convenient handling. The base of the kettle is flat and wide, providing stability when placed on surfaces. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments.
description: A weathered, metallic dome-shaped kettle with a black arched handle, short spout, and domed lid with a knob. The finish is matte and plain, emphasizing utility.
description_view_0: The kettle is seen from a front angle, clearly showing the spout, arched handle, and domed lid with knob.
description_view_1: Rear view of the kettle, highlighting the back curve of the body and the full arch of the handle, with the spout not visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the spout protruding from the right, the handle arch, and the domed lid with knob.
description_view_3: Direct view into the spout, with the handle arching away and the body of the kettle forming a rounded base.
